benefits.description: Lost 215 pounds since starting tirzepatide (pharma then grey market)

side_effects.description: Felt hit and miss throughout — weeks where it seemed to stop working, weeks where it felt good; attributed to body adjusting rather than product quality

protocol_notes: Used name brand Mounjaro for 2 years before switching to grey market. Janoshik testing of grey market product came back as advertised. Variability in effect attributed to body adjustment, not product quality.
